endpoints.name: Returns severe weather alerts issued by meteorological agencies - Given a lat/lon.
endpoints.description: Returns severe weather alerts issued by meteorological agencies - given a lat, and a lon.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.

endpoints.name: Download pre-generated bulk datasets
endpoints.description: Downloads bulk data files - OPTIONS: ( current.csv.gz, forecast_hourly.csv.gz, forecast_daily.csv.gz). Units are Metric (Celcius, m/s, etc).
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FILE}} with a real file.

endpoints.name: Returns current air quality conditions - Given City and/or State, Country.
endpoints.description: Returns current air quality conditions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITY}} with a real city. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country.

endpoints.description: Returns current air quality conditions.

endpoints.name: Returns current air quality conditions - Given a lat/lon.
endpoints.description: Returns current air quality conditions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.

endpoints.name: Returns current air quality conditions - Given a Postal Code.
endpoints.description: Returns current air quality conditions.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POSTAL_CODE}} with a real postal_code.

endpoints.name: Returns a group of observations given a list of cities
endpoints.description: Returns a group of Current Observations - Given a list of City IDs.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITIES}} with a real cities.

endpoints.name: Returns a Current Observation - Given City and/or State, Country.
endpoints.description: Returns a Current Observation - Given a city in the format of City,ST or City. The state, and country parameters can be provided to make the search more accurate.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITY}} with a real city. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country.

endpoints.name: Returns a current observation by city id.
endpoints.description: Returns current weather observation - Given a City ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITY_ID}} with a real city_id.

endpoints.name: Returns a Current Observation - Given a lat/lon.
endpoints.description: Returns a Current Observation - given a lat, and a lon.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.

endpoints.name: Returns a group of observations given a list of points in the format (lat1, lon1), (lat2, lon2), (latN, lonN), ...
endpoints.description: Returns a group of Current Observations - Given a list of points (lat1, lon1), (lat2, lon2), (latN, lonN), ...
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POINTS}} with a real points.

endpoints.name: Returns a current observation by postal code.
endpoints.description: Returns current weather observation - Given a Postal Code.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POSTAL_CODE}} with a real postal_code.

endpoints.name: Returns a Current Observation. - Given a station ID.
endpoints.description: Returns a Current Observation - Given a station ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{STATION}} with a real station.

endpoints.name: Returns a group of observations given a list of stations
endpoints.description: Returns a group of Current Observations - Given a list of Station Call IDs.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{STATIONS}} with a real stations.

endpoints.name: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast - Given City and/or State, Country.
endpoints.description: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast, where each point represents a one hour period.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITY}} with a real city. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country.

endpoints.name: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast - Given a City ID.
endpoints.description: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast, where each point represents a one hour period.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITY_ID}} with a real city_id.

endpoints.name: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast - Given a lat/lon.
endpoints.description: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast, where each point represents a one hour period.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.

endpoints.name: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast - Given a Postal Code.
endpoints.description: Returns 72 hour (hourly) Air Quality forecast, where each point represents a one hour period.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POSTAL_CODE}} with a real postal_code.

endpoints.name: Returns a daily forecast - Given City and/or State, Country.
endpoints.description: Returns a daily forecast, where each point represents one day (24hr) period. Every point has a datetime string in the format "YYYY-MM-DD". One day begins at 00:00 UTC, and ends at 23:59 UTC. Accepts a city in the format of City,ST or City. The state, and country parameters can be provided to make the search more accurate.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITY}} with a real city. Replace {{COUNTRY}} with a real country.

endpoints.name: Returns a daily forecast - Given a City ID.
endpoints.description: Returns a daily forecast, where each point represents one day (24hr) period. Every point has a datetime string in the format "YYYY-MM-DD". One day begins at 00:00 UTC, and ends at 23:59 UTC.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CITY_ID}} with a real city_id.

endpoints.name: Returns a daily forecast - Given Lat/Lon.
endpoints.description: Returns a daily forecast, where each point represents one day (24hr) period. Every point has a datetime string in the format "YYYY-MM-DD". One day begins at 00:00 UTC, and ends at 23:59 UTC.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.

endpoints.name: Returns a daily forecast - Given a Postal Code.
endpoints.description: Returns a daily forecast, where each point represents one day (24hr) period. Every point has a datetime string in the format "YYYY-MM-DD". One day begins at 00:00 UTC, and ends at 23:59 UTC.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{POSTAL_CODE}} with a real postal_code.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LON}} with a real lon. Replace {{LAT}} with a real lat.
